
---
name: Propose a new scenario
about: Reserve an ID and confirm scope before opening a PR
title: "[New scenario] <sector>: <short title>"
labels: scenario, triage
---

## Proposed ID

`<SECTOR>-<NNN>` (let a maintainer assign the number — list the sector and a hint)

## One-paragraph rationale

What scenario, what AU operator population would care, what public evidence anchors it.

## Public sources

- [ ] CISA / ACSC / ASD advisory
- [ ] OAIC NDB report
- [ ] Disclosed incident with public reporting
- [ ] Academic paper or vendor public threat report
- [ ] Other (list)

## Scannability

Roughly how many nodes do you expect, and how many will be `scannable: false`? (SOCI Threat Atlas scenarios should usually have at least one unscannable node.)

## Author

Your GitHub handle and (optionally) organisation.
